mapper.update: UPDATE reservation SET status = CASE WHEN status = 'CONFIRMED' THEN 'COMPLETED' WHEN status = 'PENDING' THEN 'CANCELLED' END WHERE status IN ('CONFIRMED', 'PENDING') AND reservation_date < #{today}
mapper.select: SELECT start_time AS startTime, COUNT(*) AS reservedCount FROM reservation WHERE facility_id = #{facilityId} AND reservation_date = #{reservationDate} AND status = 'CONFIRMED' GROUP BY start_time ORDER BY start_time

SELECT r.reservation_id, r.user_id, r.facility_id, f.name AS facilityName, r.reservation_date, r.start_time, r.end_time, r.seat_no, r.status, r.created_at FROM reservation r JOIN facility f ON f.facility_id = r.facility_id WHERE r.reservation_id = #{reservationId}
